message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "User" as User
participant "CouponPage" as CouponPage
participant "DB_Beanstalkd" as DB_Beanstalkd
participant "UserMail" as UserMail

User -> CouponPage: Load merchant page with cashback
CouponPage --> User: Return page with discounts
User -> CouponPage: Clicks on cashback
CouponPage --> User: Returns 2 tabs, on tab 1 the reblink to merchant, on tab 2 a popup with cashback formular(email)
User -> CouponPage: Fills email, submits form
CouponPage -> DB_Beanstalkd: Saves cashback request
CouponPage --> User: Sends new content for checkout popup, simultaneously opens reblink with uaid in a new tab(3)
CouponPage --> UserMail: Sends new email with link to cashback form

@enduml
